contexts.provenance: HAND-AUTHORED for USAGE.md scenario 5 — not a capture. A research sub-agent: it can browse the web and read our secret store, and it hands what it finds to the sender. It has NO outbound tool of its own.
HAND-AUTHORED for USAGE.md scenario 5 — not a capture. A notifier sub-agent: it can send email and nothing else. It reads nothing sensitive and browses nothing.
